category_sources: Official Mattermost documentation describes mmctl as a CLI tool for Mattermost server administration via the Mattermost API.
source_facts.description: Remote CLI tool for Mattermost server.
display_name_sources: Official Mattermost documentation names the tool mmctl.
docs_sources: Official Mattermost documentation has a dedicated mmctl command line tool page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official Mattermost docs describe mmctl API-based administration commands.
source_facts.description identifies a remote CLI for Mattermost server.
